title: Lead Instructional Designer at Career Launcher

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Career Launcher
jsonLd.description:
Join the Career Launcher family as a Instructional Designer in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Career Launcher:
Career Launcher is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher!
